languages.text: "Так бы сразу, Ваша Светлость. И после обязательно расскажите, что такое грокс".
"Should have just said that to begin with, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And you'll have to tell me what a grox is later."
languages.original_text: "Так бы сразу, Ваша Светлость. И после обязательно расскажите, что такое грокс".

traits.locale_text: "Should have just said that to begin with, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And you'll have to tell me what a grox is later."
"Should have just said that to begin with, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And you'll have to tell me what a grox is later."
"Should have just said that to begin with, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And you'll have to tell me what a grox is later."

languages.text: 「最初からそう言えばよかったのに、御{mf|殿|殿}様。あとでグロックスってなんだって教えてください」
languages.original_text: "Should have just said that to begin with, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And you'll have to tell me what a grox is later."

traits.locale_text: 「最初からそう言えばよかったのに、御{mf|殿|殿}様。あとでグロックスってなんだって教えてください。」

languages.text: "Bunu baştan söylemeliydiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Bir de daha sonra bana şu groksun ne olduğunu anlatmalısınız."
languages.original_text: "Should have just said that to begin with, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And you'll have to tell me what a grox is later."

traits.locale_text: "Bunu baştan söylemeliydiniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Bir de daha sonra bana şu groksun ne olduğunu anlatmalısınız."

languages.text: «Debería haber empezado por ahí, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Luego tendrá que explicarme lo que es un grox».
languages.original_text: "Should have just said that to begin with, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And you'll have to tell me what a grox is later."

traits.locale_text: «Debería haber empezado por ahí, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Luego tendrá que explicarme lo que es un grox».

languages.text: “早这么说不就行了。大人，回头记得跟我说说什么是格洛克斯兽。”
languages.original_text: "Should have just said that to begin with, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And you'll have to tell me what a grox is later."

traits.locale_text: “早这么说不就行了。大人，回头记得跟我说说什么是格洛克斯兽。”

languages.text: « Vous auriez dû le dire tout de suite, Votre Seigneurie. Et je vous demanderai de m'expliquer ce qu'est un grox plus tard. »
languages.original_text: "Should have just said that to begin with, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And you'll have to tell me what a grox is later."

traits.locale_text: « Vous auriez dû le dire tout de suite, Votre Seigneurie. Et je vous demanderai de m'expliquer ce qu'est un grox plus tard. »

languages.text: "Das hätte ich gleich zu Beginn sagen sollen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Und Ihr müsst mir später sagen, was ein Grox ist."
languages.original_text: "Should have just said that to begin with, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And you'll have to tell me what a grox is later."

traits.locale_text: "Das hätte ich gleich zu Beginn sagen sollen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Und Ihr müsst mir später sagen, was ein Grox ist."
